title: Methods for Accessing I/O Devices
description: A flowchart illustrating the primary methods a CPU uses to communicate with and control I/O devices, highlighting the flow of data and control signals.
relationships: CPU initiates I/O operation via control bus
CPU reads/writes to I/O controller registers (Memory-Mapped I/O) or uses special I/O instructions (Isolated I/O)
I/O Controller manages data transfer between device and memory via data bus
Controller updates status register for CPU to poll
Controller can interrupt CPU via interrupt request line
